feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: Deluv_011

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,560Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 556

Summary: Damian Wayne and Conner Kent form an unexpected couple. However, few knew that behind that façade, each of them had their heart burning for someone else. Thus, Damian and Conner cling to each other as a distorted reflection of what they truly long for. Damian yearns for Jon Kent. Conner pines for Tim Drake. And the deeper they fall into that strange relationship, the more they begin to notice certain glances among their teammates… glances that reveal far more than mere friendship.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: stab at faith
entry.summary:
Author: babybluecontinental

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,807Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 86

Summary: Clark Kent needs a new job. Disabled, reclusive, and depressed billionaire Bruce Wayne needs a friend, though he’d never admit it. Alfred Pennyworth thinks the two should live together so they both get what they need and so he can finally retire. They get more.

entry.title: Grief
entry.summary:
Author: WrenA

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,964Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Clark Kent does not handle grief well. Neither does Superman. Batman is good at compartmentalizing but maybe Bruce Wayne is seeping into him.   Or How Superman learned Batman's heartbeat.

entry.title: Adoption to Adoration
entry.summary:
Author: Missingjay

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,593Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 822

Summary: Bruce Wayne, interstellar bounty hunter, is trapped in a nightmare. Lost in the depths of space, abducted by aliens and held captive as a mindless beast. Powerless to resist the whims of the aliens or reason with them for his release, he is utterly trapped. Kal-el, a freelance journalist specializing in xenobiology correspondence, is in love. A surly little unclassified mammalian at the shelter he volunteers at has stolen his core. He’s never had a pet before and this creature has a history of servere behavioral problems, but he can’t let the poor thing stay at the shelter forever without trying to save it. How hard could exotic pet ownership be.

entry.title: Out on the Ocean, Sailing away, I can hardly wait to see you come of age, But I guess we'll both just have to be patient
entry.summary:
Author: Hades_the_god_of_the_underworld

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,427Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 492

Summary: Despite what most people thought, Percy’s first title wasn’t ‘son of Poseidon’ or ‘defeater of the minotaur’. No, his very first title was Perseus Odysseus Wayne, Prince of Gotham. Gotham’s press went wild the day he was born –partially, because his father was only eighteen when he had him. While Gotham obviously wasn’t very conservative, it was still quite the scandal. Especially given that Percy’s other parent was completely unknown. His face was plastered across every headline for three weeks and would be a frequent part of the news for many years to follow. Being the only child of Bruce Wayne, the sole Wayne family heir, was a very big deal. Not that Percy really cared. - - - Or in a universe where Bruce Wayne, a man with clear sight blessed by Nemesis, fell in love with Poseidon, who was being compelled to have a child by the fates, have a son together, Percy Jackson's life ends up just a little different. Not enough to change the timeline, but enough to change his childhood and eventually, his life post-war. Especially when he discovers his dead brother is alive and subsequently returns to Gotham.

entry.title: Love Me For Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,530Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Bruce Wayne died destroying a Xenomorph Queen. Clark Kent mourned him with Kryptonian ritual and carried the key to the Batcave against his sternum for nine days. Then Jason Todd brought Bruce back. Resurrection via Lazarus Pit is never clean. Bruce returns with his memories intact and a rage that displaces every other emotion. The two-meter distance that kept Clark alive in the hive becomes the boundary that keeps Bruce from violence. The team fractures over the ethics of resurrection without consent. And in the Pacific Northwest, something new is hunting—parasitic neural infiltrators that enter through the ear canal and leave their hosts conscious during control. Bruce volunteers as bait. Clark shadows him every meter. The key stays cold against Clark's chest. And somewhere in the Cascade Range, a Yautja marks Batman as worthy prey. "You were wrong to do it. But I'm glad you did." Love that persists despite impossibility. Love that consumes despite resistance. Love that exists in darkness and is overcome by forces larger than itself. This is what remains.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Proof of Detection
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,093Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 96

Summary: The worst has already happened - Recognition, Rejection, devastation. Now Bruce and Clark are forced to work together to solve a mystery that could alter the course of the world, while helping to build the Justice League. Can Bruce live with what he's done? Can Clark forgive the ultimate betrayal? Will the League survive the fallout if they can't?

entry.title: Good Ole' Fashion Lover Boy
entry.summary:
Author: Positive_Reinforcements

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,048Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Bruce Wayne was the Prince of Gotham; he was effortlessly beautiful, very charming, and a bit of a recluse. On the off-chance he would come out of Wayne manor, he would very rarely interact with other people–even more rare for those people to be reporters. Bruce just so happens to run into possibly the most handsome man he’s ever seen: but of course, the man is a reporter. Yuck. ‘What a pity, all that wasted on a heartless profession. You couldn’t catch me dead willingly interacting with them. Ha! Imagine it…’ Oh, if only Bruce knew what was in store for him... (The main title and chapter titles will be quotes of Queens "Good Ole' Fashion Lover Boy" XD )

entry.title: I'm Back in the Fucking Building Again?!
entry.summary:
Author: The_Bluest_of_Blues

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,039Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 344

Summary: In a post apocalyptic future, Batman and Superman are left alone. Everyone else is dead. After they conclude that there is nothing left for them to save, they somehow find themselves waking up in their 14 year old bodies all the way back in 1984! Neither are apt to look a gift horse in the mouth.

entry.title: Despite everything, it’s still you
entry.summary:
Author: VettTrece

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 98,618Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 574

Summary: Bruce Wayne, lonely, distrustful, and worn down by a city that never changes, witnesses the impossible: a man flies in front of him, no wires, no tricks, no logical explanation. Superman has arrived. Not as the man from Bruce's world, but as a figure who shouldn’t have crossed the threshold. He hails from a different universe, one with different rules. A place where, according to his logic, Bruce is meant to be his soulmate. But in this Gotham, there is no destiny, there is no hope. In his home there's no room for myths. Until now. Or: Clark isn't in his own world: the one where soulmates are as natural as the warmth of the sun or the darkness of night. He doesn't know how he ended up here; perhaps fate, perhaps chance, but undeniably the Gotham's vigilante spoke the first words destiny had reserved for him. And yet, everything feels strange, like a distorted reflection of the reality he once knew. Bruce, unaware of the burden Clark carries, chooses to help him find a way back to his world, and along the way, to uncover more about his own reality. Léelo en Español aquí.

entry.title: you're still young, that's your fault
entry.summary:
Author: snapdragonsuplex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,416Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 327

Summary: “... did you want to talk about, Jason?” Dick hears Clark ask. “Um, I…” Jason takes a breath. “I know it’s kinda… weird, and maybe you won’t want to, but I-I talked to Leila about it and she said if I wanted to ask then I should just ask—” “Jason,” Bruce interrupts, “it’s alright. What do you want to ask us?” Jason is quiet for a few minutes. Dick is about to poke his head around the corner to look at him when he finally speaks up. “I was… thinking maybe I could start calling you guys Dad and Pa?” Dick’s stomach drops. ------------- Jason asks to start calling Bruce and Clark his dads. Dick... doesn't handle it well.

entry.title: The day the Earth became Krypton
entry.summary:
Author: Philis283

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 97,636Chapters: 36/?Kudos: 466

Summary: Based on 'The Kryptonians who invaded Earth' the Kryptonians have run out of Omega's due to an unexplained viruses, so the travel to planets to find a comparable species which happens to be Earth. Where Kal finds his dream Omega called Bruce Wayne.

entry.title: I Used To Obsess Over Living, Now I Only Obsess Over You
entry.summary:
Author: l0s3rzclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 100,182Chapters: 13/14Kudos: 295

Summary: Clark, of course, knew that Bruce Wayne had been studying at Metropolis University. The billionaire was all anyone could talk about when he first got accepted. Except for Clark. He'd actually counted himself lucky to never run into the guy. From the sounds of it, Bruce was just another rich kid with a superiority complex. ______ OR: Enemies to Lovers College AU because it's so fucking good.
